'''shagawa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:deacetylcerbertin|deacetylcerbertin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-g-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deacetylcerbertin|deacetylcerbertin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| shagawa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shægæwæth|shægæwæth]] || [[word:shægæwæj|shægæwæj]] || [[word:shægæwæsh|shægæwæsh]] || [[word:shægæwæ|shægæwæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shagagawath|shagagawath]] || [[word:shagagawaj|shagagawaj]] || [[word:shagagawash|shagagawash]] || [[word:shagagawa|shagagawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shagawath|shagawath]] || [[word:shagawaj|shagawaj]] || [[word:shagawash|shagawash]] || [[word:shagawa|shagawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shagafwath|shagafwath]] || [[word:shagafwaj|shagafwaj]] || [[word:shagafwash|shagafwash]] || [[word:shagafwaf|shagafwaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shagawatha|shagawatha]] || [[word:shagawaja|shagawaja]] || [[word:shagawasha|shagawasha]] || [[word:shagawaka|shagawaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shagawath|shagawath]] || [[word:shagawaj|shagawaj]] || [[word:shagawash|shagawash]] || [[word:shagawa|shagawa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shagawathal|shagawathal]] || [[word:shagawajal|shagawajal]] || [[word:shagawashal|shagawashal]] || [[word:shagawakal|shagawakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shagawathatha|shagawathatha]] || [[word:shagawajaja|shagawajaja]] || [[word:shagawashasha|shagawashasha]] || [[word:shagawaka|shagawaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shagawathan|shagawathan]] || [[word:shagawajan|shagawajan]] || [[word:shagawashan|shagawashan]] || [[word:shagawakan|shagawakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shagawathaoro|shagawathaoro]] || [[word:shagawajaoro|shagawajaoro]] || [[word:shagawashaoro|shagawashaoro]] || [[word:shagawakaoro|shagawakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
